steps.title: Identify the task
steps.content: The student needs to provide a specific example of a public service that Tlahuiltepa is responsible for. The notes name one: water treatment. The correct choice must link Tlahuiltepa to that specific service.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the right one
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'As a municipality, Tlahuiltepa is responsible for providing water treatment to its residents.': Names Tlahuiltepa and gives the specific public service (water treatment) from the notes — exactly what the task requires. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Tlahuiltepa is one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo providing public services to their communities.': Mentions public services only in the abstract; no specific service is named. ✗
  • Choice C — 'In 2020, the municipality of Tlahuiltepa had a population of 9,086.': Population data has nothing to do with public services. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Tlahuiltepa — a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico — provides public services to its residents.': Like B, refers to public services generically without naming any specific example. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
